{ "name": "carbonphp/carbon-doctrine-types", "description": "Types to use Carbon in Doctrine", "type": "library", "keywords": [ "date", "time", "DateTime", "Carbon", "Doctrine" ], "require": { "php": "^8.1" }, "require-dev": { "doctrine/dbal": "^4.0.0", "nesbot/carbon": "^2.71.0 || ^3.0.0", "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.3" }, "conflict": { "doctrine/dbal": "<4.0.0 || >=5.0.0" }, "license": "MIT", "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Carbon\\Doctrine\\": "src/Carbon/Doctrine/" } }, "authors": [ { "name": "KyleKatarn", "email": "kylekatarnls@gmail.com" } ], "minimum-stability": "dev" }
